title: Game Modes
description: Understand the available ZXSnake play modes and choose the right structure for your session goal.

sections.heading: Game Modes
paragraphs: Understand the available ZXSnake play modes and choose the right structure for your session goal.

featureShowcases.heading: ZXSnake game modes
featureShowcases.summary: Game Modes explains how ZXSnake structures survival runs, score chasing, food collection, and progression goals.
body: This matters because players need to know what kind of session they are starting and how success is measured.
Players use this page to choose the right mode for a quick game, a focused practice run, or a score-chasing session.
bullets: Connects mode choice to controls, tips, and leaderboards.
Keeps App Store-friendly wording focused on gameplay.

image.caption: ZXSnake mode artwork supports the game mode explanation.
